column1: What is the most important thing to fix in my store right now?;2026-05-20 16:27:43.623419+00;cbea7a7a-332b-4f6a-999b-6307074bd84e;user;8f69efc1-4771-42df-9f39-c6ac2e16e9a1

The most critical issue with **Aggu's Cafe** right now is that you have **zero payment methods enabled**, meaning customers cannot actually buy your coffee or snacks. Even though you have 3 paid orders in your history, currently both Razorpay and COD are turned off.

To fix this immediately:
1. Go to [Payment Settings](/payment-settings).
2. **Enable COD (Cash on Delivery)** for an instant fix, or connect your **Razorpay keys** to accept online payments.
3. While you're at it, finish your [Onboarding](/onboarding) (Step 4) to ensure your store is fully optimized.

You also have **3 unshipped orders** waiting—would you like me to guide you on how to generate shipping labels for them?;2026-05-20 16:27:47.550966+00;99911e26-a306-479f-baa6-4b79aabb3ff2;assistant;8f69efc1-4771-42df-9f39-c6ac2e16e9a1
Mine is a coffee cafe and we have pay at counter option available;2026-05-20 16:28:42.713537+00;f5f4b579-a123-49e6-ad88-c73497586201;user;8f69efc1-4771-42df-9f39-c6ac2e16e9a1

Since you offer "Pay at Counter," the best way to handle this on PicToCart is to **Enable COD (Cash on Delivery)**. This allows your customers to place orders online and pay you physically when they arrive at the cafe.

Here is how to set it up:
1. Go to [Payment Settings](/payment-settings).
2. Toggle the **Enable COD** switch to "On."
3. (Optional) You can rename the label to "Pay at Counter" in your checkout settings so it's clear to your customers.

Once enabled, those **3 unshipped orders** can be processed. Would you like to know how to mark them as "Completed" once the customers pay at your cafe?;2026-05-20 16:28:46.157628+00;6249173a-ed4d-46ae-9352-ce456eab5e33;assistant;8f69efc1-4771-42df-9f39-c6ac2e16e9a1

It is saying Cash on Delivery
Always Active;2026-05-20 16:31:08.225833+00;d5f0bd62-4f08-4495-9c24-532d9d8999e8;user;8f69efc1-4771-42df-9f39-c6ac2e16e9a1

Since your dashboard shows **COD is Always Active**, that's great—it means customers can already place orders to pay at your counter. However, the most urgent thing to address now is that you have **3 unshipped orders** with a total revenue of ₹2,075 that need to be cleared.

To manage these "Pay at Counter" orders:
1. Go to your [Orders](/orders) page.
2. Click on each pending order from your cafe.
3. Once the customer pays at the counter, manually mark them as **Delivered/Completed** so your sales analytics stay accurate.

Also, since you are on the **Free Plan**, you might want to check out [Billing](/billing) if you'd like to connect a custom domain (like `agguscafe.com`) instead of the default link. Does that sound like something you'd need?;2026-05-20 16:31:12.382003+00;f63ecb48-a38c-4732-ae81-dea99b7b23d8;assistant;8f69efc1-4771-42df-9f39-c6ac2e16e9a1
all orders are served so there is no need to ship.;2026-05-20 16:32:27.54928+00;373f2ee0-2b55-4903-bdcd-df52e24a8a7e;user;8f69efc1-4771-42df-9f39-c6ac2e16e9a1

Since these were served at the cafe, you just need to clear them from your "Unshipped" list so your dashboard stays updated.

**Actions to take:**
1. Go to [Orders](/orders).
2. Open each of the **3 pending orders**.
3. Manually update the status to **Delivered** or **Completed**. This will move them out of your pending queue and finalize your ₹2,075 revenue record.

Since your workflow is "Pay at Counter," would you like help setting up a **QR Code** for your cafe so customers can scan and order directly from their tables?;2026-05-20 16:32:31.06695+00;db8f06ac-8e9e-406e-be95-0f23cff67db3;assistant;8f69efc1-4771-42df-9f39-c6ac2e16e9a1
What is the most important thing to fix in my store right now?;2026-05-26 12:26:59.210798+00;db60e13b-4123-4185-8afe-a86242380527;user;e6e462e3-dee8-4287-8c24-ab9b40eb0e24

Hi! Looking at your store **Indilipi**, the most critical issue is that **customers currently cannot pay you**. Since neither Razorpay nor COD is enabled, your checkout will not work.

Here is how to fix this and get your store ready:

1.  **Enable Payments:** Go to [Payment Settings](/payment-settings) to link your Razorpay keys or toggle **Cash on Delivery (COD)** to 'On'.
2.  **Complete Onboarding:** You are currently at Step 4. Visit [Onboarding](/onboarding) to finish the final setup steps.
3.  **Add Brand Identity:** Your store is missing a logo. You can upload one in [Store Design](/store-design) to build trust with fashion shoppers.

Would you like help setting up your Razorpay keys or should we look at adding more products first?;2026-05-26 12:27:03.067823+00;c92eaca1-133e-4c5e-8b40-75e58a4030ec;assistant;e6e462e3-dee8-4287-8c24-ab9b40eb0e24
Check again I have already created everything;2026-05-26 12:28:10.267233+00;22c05e17-80d3-4cca-84f1-242f20cf5ac1;user;e6e462e3-dee8-4287-8c24-ab9b40eb0e24

I understand you've put in the work, but according to your store's current data, there are **two technical blockers** preventing you from actually receiving orders:

1.  **Checkout is Disabled:** Even though you have a product listed, customers cannot complete a purchase because [Payment Settings](/payment-settings) shows **Razorpay is not configured** and **COD is turned off**. You must enable at least one to take orders.
2.  **Onboarding Incomplete:** Your [Onboarding](/onboarding) status is still marked as incomplete (Step 4). Finishing this ensures your store is fully synced for shipping and notifications.

**Quick Action:** Please head to [Payment Settings](/payment-settings) and toggle **Enable Cash on Delivery** to "On" immediately so you can start testing your checkout.
